text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from a training session at a track
in the city...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf comes to a halt in front of a
display window.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I have been sleepwalking into disaster, it seems...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The fruits of my indolence are beginning to show.
I have put on weight.
choice_data_list: You look the same to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous. Can't you see how the seams
of my skirt strain?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It appears the student council's clerical duties
have done me no favors...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I must set an example for my fellow students in both action and appearance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I must redress this as quickly as possible, and I am
afraid you will have to assist me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we work together on a diet program
until Symboli Rudolf regains a racing physique she
is satisfied with.
